bonuses.stat:
When you deal damage with a fully-charged Heavy Attack, you gain an Imbued Aura for 10 seconds, granting you and up to 3 other group members 7-307 Magicka and Stamina Recovery. This effect can occur once every 20 seconds.

If you deal damage with a fully-charged Heavy Attack with an Imbued Aura active, consume it and gain an Overflow Aura for 10 seconds, granting you and up to 3 other group members 7-307 Weapon and Spell Damage.
